title: Are Ryoji Kaji and Gendo the same person as in time travel
display_title: Are Ryoji Kaji and Gendo the same person as in time travel
wikitext:
[]: Are Ryoji Kaji and Gendo the same person, as in time travel?             Quote Post by Viethra » Fri Apr 19, 2013 4:35 am I have a really stupid theory that somehow Kaji is a younger version of Gendo from an alternate timeline via the Third Impact reset shenanigans. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Fri Apr 19, 2013 4:41 am Sure, why not.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Apr 19, 2013 4:52 am You could have specified from where the spoiler come from, now I've been spoiled the game, thank you!

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Apr 19, 2013 5:05 am We've seen what Young Gendo looks like though. And he looks and acts nothing like Kaji. And beside, Kaji was killed. If he were Young Gendo, Colonel Campbell would have appeared and told us that a time paradox was just created. And then like Doc Brown says, the universe would have been destroyed.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Fri Apr 19, 2013 7:05 am ElMariachi wrote: You could have specified from where the spoiler come from, now I've been spoiled the game, thank you!

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Apr 19, 2013 7:35 am A) Third Impact doesn't work that way; B) We know what Gendo looked like when he was younger than Kaji; C) Kaji is far more mature than Gendo could ever hope to be, and is not the sort to get obsessed with a woman a la Gendo in any event. Going from where Kaji is now to where Gendo is seems unlikely at best.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Apr 19, 2013 2:25 pm This is the most balls-ass random idea I've ever seen on this forum. I'm not sure if that's a good thing or not.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Fri Apr 19, 2013 2:33 pm AuraTwilight wrote: This is the most balls-ass random idea I've ever seen on this forum. I'm not sure if that's a good thing or not.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Apr 19, 2013 2:48 pm Wouldn't it make more sense for Gendo to be a time travelling Shinji? I mean, it would explain his fixation on Rei/Yui for one thing. Also, I for one appreciate people thinking outside the box like this. Now that said, this is the definitive argument against. The Killer of Heroes wrote: We've seen what Young Gendo looks like though. And he looks and acts nothing like Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Apr 19, 2013 3:00 pm This is an excellent spirit of posting awesome theories, but this one looks to be successfully debunked. I propose that we leave this thread here for the sake of it gathering an awesome tangent that we can split into its own thread.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Fri Apr 19, 2013 6:31 pm I wanted to add that Misato compares Kaji with her own father Dr. Katsuragi, so Gendo would also be like Misato's father in a way and something like that would have been probably mentioned by Misato: Misato: "You know Shinji, your father is just like mine, we might even be brothers LOL" Shinji: *heads explodes due to yet another semi-incestuous relationship with a woman in his live"

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 19, 2013 7:28 pm K40s : Dr. Katsuragi and Gendo are actually paralleled in the show, from the very first episode ("So you don't get along with your father, either. You're just like me."), and some interesting things could be written about the parallels... But the reason they exist is not to imply any weird time-traveling antics, but to flesh out Shinji and Misato's relationship and respective statuses as protagonist and deuteragonist.

[]:             Quote Post by ProbsT » Sat Apr 27, 2013 9:57 pm Thanks for the spoiler about Bioshock: Infinite. You could've specified it. Anyways, I think there's no sense in your theory. You see, scenes about Gendo's past and Kaji's past are showed explicitly in the series. Also, in my point of view, they have very different personalities.
